title: schismus minutus
intro: Schismus minutus, also known as needle grass, is a type of annual grass native to Europe, Asia, and North Africa. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Schismus minutus include treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis, coughs, and colds, as well as reducing inflammation and improving digestion. Schismus minutus can be prepared as a herbal tea or tincture, and it is also used in traditional folk medicine as a poultice to treat skin irritations and wounds.
